packs.title: Visuals Demo (math + diagrams)
packs.description: Tiny pack to verify lesson reading, LaTeX math, and SVG diagram rendering. Safe to install and delete.

packs.title: Mathematics
packs.description: Math spine for EE/radar/software: 12 sub-topics, algebra & dB math through detection & estimation. Each lesson has a reading, LaTeX math, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Analog Electronics
packs.description: Analog refresh for EE/radar/software: 15 sub-topics, DC networks through noise, layout and instrumentation. Each lesson has a reading, LaTeX math, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Digital Electronics
packs.description: Digital refresh + modernize for EE/radar/software: 14 sub-topics from number systems through HDL and FPGAs. Each lesson has a reading, LaTeX/code, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Embedded Systems
packs.description: Embedded refresh + modernize for EE/radar/software: 15 sub-topics from the bare-metal memory map through RTOS, real-time, and DSP-on-MCU. Each lesson has a reading, code/LaTeX, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Linux Systems
packs.description: Linux from the boot vector up for EE/radar/software: 19 sub-topics from the shell through systemd, the kernel, containers, storage, networking, and embedded Linux. Each lesson has a reading, code, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Networking
packs.description: Networking refresh + modernize for EE/radar/software: 17 sub-topics from layering and the PHY through TCP/TLS/QUIC, wireless, embedded networking, and SDN. Each lesson has a reading, code, and diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Wave Propagation
packs.description: Wave propagation / EM for EE/radar/software: 13 sub-topics from Maxwell and plane waves through transmission lines, the Smith chart, antennas, arrays/beamforming, propagation, and link budgets. The physics gate before radar. Readings + LaTeX + diagrams; tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Physics (partial)
packs.description: Physics from scratch for complete beginners (PARTIAL - building out): what physics is, motion, forces, energy, waves, electricity, light and more. Beginner-first readings, lots of diagrams, tiered easy to hard.
